message:
fix(verifier_economy,capsule): canonicalize public keys in registry and expand capsule signing payload coverage

verifier_economy/mod.rs:
- Add canonicalize_ed25519_public_key_hex() and
  canonicalized_ed25519_public_keys_match() for consistent key comparison
- register_verifier() now canonicalizes the public key before storing,
  preventing duplicate registrations with different key formats (e.g.,
  ed25519: prefix, mixed case)
- Add ERR_VEP_INVALID_PUBLIC_KEY error code for malformed keys at
  registration time
- verify_signature_with_expected_key() uses canonicalized key comparison
  instead of raw string equality, preventing false rejections when
  registrations used a different format than signatures

sdk/verifier/src/capsule.rs:
- Expand compute_signing_payload() to include description, claim_type,
  created_at, creator_identity, input_refs, and metadata in the signed
  hash — previously only capsule_id, schema_version, expected_output_hash,
  payload, and inputs were covered, meaning changes to the other manifest
  fields would not invalidate the signature
- Extract push_length_prefixed() helper for consistent length-prefixed
  hashing
- Add assert_manifest_tamper_rejected() test helper for compact signature
  invalidation tests across all manifest fields
- Fix formatting of ManifestIncomplete error returns

Also updates beads issue tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
